title: Show Renewal Risk banner on Account
description: As a sales user, I want to see a Renewal Risk banner on Account records when the renewal risk score is high so I can prioritize outreach.
acceptanceCriteria: Show the Renewal Risk banner on Account records when Renewal_Risk_Score__c is greater than or equal to 80.
Hide the banner when Renewal_Risk_Score__c is blank.
Only users with the Renewal Risk permission set should see the banner.
Show an error state if the risk service is unavailable.
